title: Observable Pattern

statement.markdown:
## Observable Pattern: Implement the Observer pattern in TypeScript, allowing multiple observers to subscribe to and receive updates from a subject. The subject should be able to add and remove observers.
### Requirements

1. Implement the Subject interface with a method to add observers and a method to notify all observers.
2. Implement the Observer interface with a method to update observers when notified by the subject.
3. Create a concrete subject class (e.g., WeatherStation) that extends the Subject interface and maintains a list of observers.
4. Create two concrete observer classes (e.g., TemperatureDisplay and HumidityDisplay) that implement the Observer interface.
5. The subject should notify all observers when its state changes.

constraints: No external libraries (e.g., rxjs) should be used.
The solution should compile and run without errors.
The solution should demonstrate the Observer pattern correctly.
